name: @smm/electron-common
description: Shared Electron main-process IPC and preload for SMM desktop shells

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/electron-common.cjs --target node --format cjs --external electron
scripts.build:ohos: bun build src/index.ts --outfile ../../apps/ohos/web_engine/src/main/resources/resfile/resources/app/electron-common.cjs --target node --format cjs --external electron && cp ohos/preload.js ../../apps/ohos/web_engine/src/main/resources/resfile/resources/app/preload.js
